name: qa_manager_create_or_update_custom_error_rule_in_rule_set_json
desc: QA Manager rule authoring: create or update an Error Manager rule inside a named RuleSet JSON. Two rule_kinds: 'expression' (parameter AND/OR chain applied to the built-in Check Custom rule) | 'property_overrides' (reuse any existing IErrorRule class and override its settings, eg minimum distance). Saves to project .mepbridge/errors/rules/<name>.json AND/OR %APPDATA%/BuildMEP/RuleSets/<name>.json. Upserts by RuleName so repeat calls update rather than duplicate.

parameters.name: rule_set_name
parameters.description: Rule set name (filesystem-safe, no extension). Created if missing.

parameters.name: rule_name
parameters.description: For property_overrides: class-level RuleName of the IErrorRule to reuse (e.g. 'Accessible for Maintenance'). For expression: a memorable identifier; defaults to 'Check Custom'.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Human readable description stored alongside the rule.

parameters.name: expression_json
parameters.description: Only for rule_kind=expression. JSON array of {parameterName, operator, value, logicalJoin} clauses.

parameters.name: properties_json
parameters.description: Only for rule_kind=property_overrides. JSON object of property overrides to set on the rule instance before execution.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether the rule is enabled in the set (default true).

keywords: qa manager create custom error rule
